---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an enhancement aligned with SISSA Mastermind guardrails
labels: enhancement
---

## A02 Alignment
Describe the problem to solve and the scope boundaries.

## A04 Data Gather
List evidence, references, or related discussions (link issues, docs). Note uncertainties.

## A06 Evaluation / A08 Options
Provide at least two implementation options with brief pros/cons.

## A07 Risk
Identify risks (performance, security, complexity) and mitigations.

## Proposed Decision (A09) & Rollback
Chosen option and how to revert if needed.

## Execution Notes (A10)
Milestones or incremental steps.

## Review / Follow-ups (A12)
Deferred ideas or metrics for later.
